title: Auditierbare Nichtkonflikt-Ausnahme für blockierende Repository-Leases
goal: Permit a second same-repository execution only when a machine-readable, hash-bound non-conflict proof shows disjoint tasks, paths, components, runtime resources, processes, deployments and migrations; preserve the original lease and fail closed for missing, stale or contradictory evidence.

acceptance.assertion: A versioned non-conflict proof records both owners, repository identity, base/head state, intended effects, exact paths, components, runtime resources, processes, deployment targets and migration domains.
The decision is bound to the proof SHA-256, both compared lease snapshots and a short validity window; any changed or missing input invalidates it.
Unknown, overlapping, wildcard or contradictory scopes remain blocked, including shared deployment, migration, generated-file, lock, queue and worktree-administration effects.
An accepted exception neither releases nor rewrites the foreign lease, worktree, branch or process and acquires only the proven exact scopes for the second owner.
Resource acquisition and the execution governor evaluate the same decision contract and emit an audit receipt with the proof and lease hashes.
Tests cover valid disjoint work, path/component/runtime/process/deploy/migration overlap, stale proof, changed lease, wildcard scope, same-owner misuse and concurrent decision races.
Merged and deployed Grabowski passes a live smoke proving accepted disjoint parallel acquisition and continued rejection of a real overlap without force release.

metadata.safety_boundary: No force release, lease theft, foreign worktree mutation or inference from task titles alone.
metadata.registration_scope: One new task file; no queue mutation or execution authority.

validation.full_local_validation: 1356 tests passed; access policy, generated contracts, runtime lock, deploy tooling and secret scan passed
validation.validation_job_result: systemd success, exit 0; separate finalization receipt was not configured for this test job

deployment.integrity: complete deployment identity, source, snapshot, lock and provenance parity

live_smoke.runtime_surface: active immutable release and installed MCP modules
live_smoke.disjoint_acquisition: allowed with proof and atomic acquisition receipt
live_smoke.foreign_broad_lease: preserved byte-for-byte and remained owned by the original owner
live_smoke.cleanup: both temporary owner-bound leases released; isolated store empty
live_smoke.mcp_registration: grabowski_resource_nonconflict_assess registered in the active MCP runtime
live_smoke.connector_schema_note: the current chat connector snapshot did not yet expose the newly deployed tool schema; the active runtime registration was verified directly

verified_acceptance.proof-contract: Verified by PR #171: the versioned manifest covers owners, repository, common base, branch, physical worktree, logical paths, generated artifacts, components, runtime resources, processes, deployments, migrations and shared gates.
verified_acceptance.hash-and-time-bound: Verified by strict canonical proof hashing, 30–300 second validity, blocker snapshot binding and atomic live revalidation under BEGIN IMMEDIATE.
verified_acceptance.fail-closed: Verified by focused tests for unknown or incomplete scopes, wildcards, symlink aliases, different bases, exact and ancestor path overlap, nested worktrees, shared gates, emergency leases, drift, expiry, races and Boolean TTL misuse.
verified_acceptance.preserve-foreign-owner: Verified live: the broad lease remained byte-identical and owned by the first owner while only the exact disjoint path was acquired for the second owner.
verified_acceptance.governor-and-resource-consistency: Verified by one shared proof contract; the governor validates proposal evidence only, while resource acquisition revalidates the live lease atomically and emits a bound receipt.
verified_acceptance.regression-tests: Verified by 149 focused tests and 1356 complete repository tests on the reviewed tree, plus green Python 3.10 and 3.12 CI.
verified_acceptance.runtime-proof: Verified on deployed merge commit b71821f1: disjoint acquisition passed, a real overlap failed with scope-conflict, the exception could not be renewed and cleanup left no test leases.

metadata.verification_note: PR #171 merged, the exact merge head was deployed with a valid finalization receipt, runtime identity was complete, the active MCP registered the new assessor and the isolated live broker smoke passed all positive, negative and cleanup checks.
